---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? If this mirrors
behavior from another shell (fish, zsh, bash, nushell), please say which.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the request.
